name: S-15 standards-remove refuses to remove a bundled source without --force per the protection contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-remove.sh" --id google-tsguide 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'bundled' err.txt && grep -q 'force' err.txt && echo refused 1>&2
